## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Andi Bailey as Head of Customer Operations and align on key priorities and initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Critical P0: Standardize client database as single source of truth for account status and communication](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Need to implement consistent rituals, cadences, and processes across all accounts/pods](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Focus on improving client communication, project management basics, and delivery mechanisms](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Investigate CM/ME productivity and time allocation to optimize cost per quality output](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)

## Topics

### Client Database and Communication Standards

  - [Current client database in Notion is outdated and not used as source of truth](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Need to standardize update process (e.g. directors update by Friday EOD)](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Implement clear cadences for client updates, meetings, and follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Ensure directors are following established processes consistently](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Project Management and Delivery Improvements

  - [Many directors lack clear strategy and organized workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Standardize use of Airtable for content tracking and assignment management](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Implement consistent content strategy approach (clusters, assignments, calibration)](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Ensure basics like published URL tracking for metrics/results visibility](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)

### Productivity and Resource Allocation

  - [Investigate why CMs reportedly only produce \~8 content pieces/week](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=1993.0)
  - [Have CMs/MEs record Loom videos of their workflows to identify inefficiencies](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Consider implementing time tracking to understand resource allocation](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)
  - [Goal: Optimize cost per quality output and improve overall efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)

### Standardization and Scaling

  - [Work on templating and standardizing processes across accounts](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Audit "best" and "worst" accounts from each director to identify gaps](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Develop plan to efficiently onboard strategy sprint clients into maintenance](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=2223.0)
  - [Balance standardization with flexibility for unique client needs](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)

### Metrics and Reporting

  - [Develop centralized view of key metrics per account (publishing volume, traffic, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
  - [Consider building health metrics into CRM (e.g. HubSpot) for upsell conversations](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Track human cost per quality output as a key KPI](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=2329.0)
  - [Implement "controllable inputs" mentality to drive desired outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=2354.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andi to meet with Matthew re: content audit findings and CM productivity](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=2119.0)
  - [Research time tracking options (potentially Linear integration)](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)
  - [Plan for Andi to record Loom videos from CMs/MEs on workflows](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Develop initial standardization plan for review with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=2405.0)
  - [Schedule in-person working session once initial plan is ready](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=2385.0)
  - [Consider implementing daily stand-ups with directors temporarily](https://fathom.video/share/2J-uLqsY-fzr64ScaC9RTeGcC1Awt1Yf?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
